title: Motivational Monday
excerpt: Thanks Mark Twain for sharing such wisdom. Just do your best and learn along the way. I'm using this watercolor set from Michaels and I have finally tried a waterbrush and found one that I love by Tim Holtz/Ranger .…
body:
Thanks Mark Twain for sharing such wisdom. Just do your best and learn along the way.

I'm using this watercolor set from Michaels and I have finally tried a waterbrush and found one that I love by Tim Holtz/Ranger. If you have a favorite quote – silly, snarky or simple in its’ wisdom, please share in the comments!
